Table summary. Responsibility Area: Software selection. Treasurer: Provides finance requirements; reviews reporting and control needs.. Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator: Provides workflow input; tests usability; supports setup if assigned.. Finance Committee: Leads evaluation, recommendation, implementation direction, and control requirements.. Personnel Committee: Consults on staffing, training, and job-impact questions.. Nominating Committee: No primary role.. Pastor: Consults on ministry and administrative needs.. Deacons: Reviews if cost, policy, or leadership impact requires.. Congregation: Votes if required by budget, contract, or church policy.. Responsibility Area: Treasurer candidate / officer recommendation. Treasurer: Provides transition input if currently serving or interim.. Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator: No role.. Finance Committee: Consults on needed finance skills and role expectations.. Personnel Committee: Consults only if personnel policy or job-description language is involved.. Nominating Committee: Leads nomination if bylaws assign this role.. Pastor: Consults and supports transition communication.. Deacons: Reviews or counsels if church practice requires.. Congregation: Votes if bylaws require election or confirmation.. Responsibility Area: Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator hiring. Treasurer: Provides role and workflow input; may participate in interviews if assigned.. Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator: Applicant or role holder; no approval role.. Finance Committee: Defines finance duties, controls, budget impact, and reporting needs.. Personnel Committee: Leads job-description, application, interview, reference, compensation-recommendation, and evaluation processes within the authority granted by the church.. Nominating Committee: Coordinates only when bylaws, a congregational motion, or church practice assign a role; does not select the candidate unless specifically authorized.. Pastor: Consults on supervision, office workflow, and ministry fit.. Deacons: Reviews if leadership practice or budget impact requires.. Congregation: Authorizes the role, compensation, or budget when bylaws, budget, policy, or church practice require congregational action.. Responsibility Area: Treasurer job description approval. Treasurer: Provides input on practicality and transition needs.. Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator: No role.. Finance Committee: Defines financial governance, controls, reporting, and committee relationship.. Personnel Committee: Helps format and maintain role description if assigned.. Nominating Committee: Reviews if tied to elected officer nomination.. Pastor: Consults.. Deacons: Reviews if church practice requires.. Congregation: Approves if bylaws or church policy require.. Responsibility Area: Bookkeeper job description approval. Treasurer: Provides workflow and reporting input.. Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator: Provides practical feedback if role is already filled.. Finance Committee: Approves or recommends finance duties, access, controls, and reporting requirements.. Personnel Committee: Leads drafting and recommends final job description, qualifications, compensation, and evaluation process.. Nominating Committee: No primary role unless governing documents assign one.. Pastor: Consults on supervision and office workflow.. Deacons: Reviews if leadership practice requires.. Congregation: Votes when creation of the role, compensation, budget change, or church policy requires congregational approval.. Responsibility Area: Reimbursement approval. Treasurer: Reviews documentation and policy compliance; approves if assigned by policy.. Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator: Processes requests after documentation and approval are complete; tracks missing receipts.. Finance Committee: Owns reimbursement policy, approval thresholds, exceptions, and monthly review.. Personnel Committee: Consults only if staff or volunteer-role accountability is affected.. Nominating Committee: No role.. Pastor: May approve ministry expenses if assigned by policy.. Deacons: Reviews exceptions if leadership practice requires.. Congregation: Votes only if reimbursement policy or budget impact requires.. Responsibility Area: Budget oversight. Treasurer: Reviews reports and helps explain variances.. Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator: Records transactions and prepares reports if assigned.. Finance Committee: Owns budget monitoring, variance review, budget exceptions, and recommendations..
